element_introduction_order.mastery_context: foundational skill required before weapon acquisition
low offensive power; supplementary movement option
first weapon upgrade; basic melee damage increase
improved weapon tier; enhanced combat effectiveness
ranged offensive capability; significant power escalation
boss-level encounters; supernatural adversaries requiring mastered skills
ultimate challenge; culmination of all learned mechanics

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: escalating supernatural threat; tempo increases through weapon progression into boss gauntlet

difficulty_curve.early_game: foundational combat mastery with bare hands and basic movement
difficulty_curve.mid_game: weapon and magic power acquisition; mythical entity introduction
difficulty_curve.late_game: supernatural army confrontation leading to Monster boss battle
notable_spikes: first mythical entity encounter (Death or Medusa)

notable_level_patterns.description: narrative progression from razed villages through magic-corrupted landscapes toward Monster's stronghold
enemies and encounters scaled to available weaponry; progression unlocked through equipment acquisition
late-game sequence of supernatural entity encounters (Death, Medusa subsumed by Monster's magic)
